title: Government warning partial (first sentence only) (motion-blur, level 7, upside-down)
image_prompt: Photorealistic clear glass bottle with a nautical silver label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Silver Anchor', 'Rum', '40% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Distilled and bottled by Anchor Bay Spirits, Newport, RI'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects.'
visualObservation: Visual note: label photo has moderate motion blur from camera shake. Camera orientation is upside-down (180 degrees). The photo is upside down and needs rotation before automated approval.
